headline: Assessing Essex Property Trust (ESS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Overview of the recent move in Essex Property Trust (ESS) Essex Property Trust (ESS) has drawn attention after a recent share price pullback, with the stock closing at US$239.61 and posting negative returns over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Essex Property Trust. Looking beyond the recent pullback, ESS has a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 18.74%, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 27.08% and 5 year total shareholder return of 2.55% suggest...

headline: Conflict Without Closure
summary: U.S. stocks slide into correction as Iran conflict fuels volatility, energy jitters, and rising rates hit REITs.

headline: How The Essex Property Trust (ESS) Narrative Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Converge
summary: Essex Property Trust’s updated analyst work now points to a fair value estimate of US$279.22, compared with the prior US$279.61, keeping the stock’s modeled worth in a very tight range. That small shift lines up with recent research where price targets cluster in the low to high US$270s, and ratings lean toward Neutral or only moderately positive as analysts balance execution risks with steady operations. As you read on, you will see how these price target tweaks fit into the broader,...
